title: Instrument d'adhésion de l'Indonésie
text_preview: Minister for Foreign Affairs Republic of Inoonesia INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION On behalf of the Republic of Indonesia, I have the honour to notify the Government of the French Republic that the Government of the Republic of Indonesia hereby accedes the Convention relating to International Exhibitions signed at Paris on 22 November 1928 and its Protocol as amended by several amendments latest drawn _at Paris 31 Mav 1988…

pages.text:
Minister for Foreign Affairs

Republic of Inoonesia

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

On behalf of the Republic of Indonesia, I have the honour to notify the

Government of the French Republic that the Government of the Republic of

Indonesia hereby accedes the Convention relating to International Exhibitions signed at Paris on 22 November 1928 and its Protocol as amended by several amendments latest drawn _at Paris 31 Mav 1988 with the following

declaration: "The Government of the Republic of Indonesia hereby declares that the immunity as stipulated in Article 25 Parahraph (3) of the said Convention is granted only to diplomatic mission, the official of the United Nations and the

Specialized Agencies, and other international organizations which are granted such status." and reservation as follows:

"The Republic of Indonesia,

while

acceding to the Convention relating to International Exhibitions and its Protocol, does not consider itself bound by the provision of Article 34 Paragraph (3) and takes the position that disputes relating to the interpretation and application on the Convention which have not been settled through the channel provided for in

Paragraph (1) of the said Article,

the nomination of the additional arbitrator

provided for in Paragraph (3) maybe referred to the President of the International

Court of Justice only with the consent of all the Parties to the dispute".

The Government of the Republic of Indonesia will assume and observe all obligations and responsibilities set forth in provisions of the Convention and its

Protocol with the aforesaid declaration and reservation.

DONE at Jakarta this

fifth day of June in this year

one thousand nine hundred and ninety seven.

MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS

OF THE REPUBLIC OF INDONESIA

Pietie

ALLALATAS

...

Menteri Iuar Aegeri

Republik Indonesia

PIAGAM AKSES!

Republik Indonesia, dengan hormat saya

memberitahukan kepada Pemerintah Republik Perancis bahwa Pemerintah

Republik Indonesia dengan ini menyatakan ikut serta pada Konvensi mengenai

Pameran Internasional berserta Protokolnya, yang ditandatangani di Paris pada tanggal 22 Nopember 1928 sebagaimana telah beberapa kali diubah terakhir di

Paris pada tanggal 31 Mei 1988 beserta Protokolnya, sesudah meneliti dan mempertimbangkannya, telah memutuskan untuk melakukan aksesi terhadap

Konvensi dengan pensyaratan sebagai berikut: "Republik Indonesia, walaupun melakukan aksesi terhadap Konvensi mengenai Pameran Internasional beserta

Protokolnya, tidak berarti terikat pada ketentuan Pasal 34 ayat (3) dan berpendirian bahwa apabila terjadi perselisihan akibat perbedaan penafsiran penerapan isi Konvensi, sebagaimana diatur dalam ayat (1) Pasal tersebut, maka pengajuan arbitrator tambahan sebagaimana diatur dalam ayat (3) dapat dirujuk ke Presiden

Mahkamah Internasional hanya berdasarkan kesepakatan Para Pihak yang

MAKA DARI ITU, AGAR DIKETAHUI, bahwa Pemerintah Republik

Indonesia dengan ini menegaskan dan menyatakan ikut serta pada Konvensi

Persera daro okliksan aken sempe keyaratan yang tarc aula atarina:

serta menerima untuk

matera EBAGAI BUKTI, Piagam Aksesi ini saya tandatangani dan bubuhi

DIBUAT di Jakarta pada tanggal

lina bulan juní tahun

seribu sembilan ratus sembilan puluh tujuh.

MENTERI LUAR NEGER

REPUBLIK INDONESIA

-tiebit

ALI ALATAS
